jobs.title: DevOps Engineering Manager

location.name: New York, New York, United States

jobs.content: <p><strong>About the ACLU</strong></p><p>The American Civil Liberties Union is seeking a DevOps Engineering Manager to lead the platform & infrastructure team at the National Office.</p>

jobs.title: Director, National Campaigns, Abuse of Power

location.name: New York, New York, United States; Washington, District of Columbia, United States

jobs.content: <p>Lead nationwide ACLU campaigns on abuse-of-power constitutional issues across federal & state advocacy fronts.</p>

jobs.title: Fall 2027 Marvin M. Karpatkin Fellowship, Racial Justice Program
jobs.content: <p>The Marvin M. Karpatkin Fellowship is a one-year position at the ACLU's Racial Justice Program in the National Office.</p>
